{'sql': "SELECT 
    s.Name AS stadium_name,
    s.Capacity,
    COUNT(c.concert_ID) AS concert_count
FROM stadium s
LEFT JOIN concert c ON s.Stadium_ID = c.Stadium_ID
WHERE c.Year >= '2014'
GROUP BY s.Stadium_ID, s.Name, s.Capacity
ORDER BY concert_count DESC
LIMIT 1;"}

SELECT 
    s.Name AS stadium_name,
    s.Capacity,
    COUNT(c.concert_ID) AS concert_count
FROM stadium s
LEFT JOIN concert c ON s.Stadium_ID = c.Stadium_ID
WHERE c.Year >= '2014'
GROUP BY s.Stadium_ID, s.Name, s.Capacity
ORDER BY concert_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

ORDER BY concert_count DESC

final.final_sql:
SELECT 
    s.Name AS stadium_name,
    s.Capacity,
    COUNT(c.concert_ID) AS concert_count
FROM stadium s
LEFT JOIN concert c ON s.Stadium_ID = c.Stadium_ID
WHERE c.Year >= '2014'
GROUP BY s.Stadium_ID, s.Name, s.Capacity
ORDER BY concert_count DESC
LIMIT 1;
final.answer_text: The stadium with the most concerts in 2014 or after is Somerset Park, with a capacity of 11,998.
